senses.definition: used to indicate exclusion of a particular thing or person

examples.x: Aside from the rain, the weather was perfect for our outdoor event.
She doesn't have any allergies aside from a mild intolerance to dairy.
Aside from the occasional disagreement, they have a strong relationship.
Everyone attended the meeting, aside from John, who was out sick.
She has no hobbies aside from reading.

senses.definition: not including a specific item, person, or condition

examples.x: Everyone attended the meeting except for John, who was on vacation.
I like all fruits except for bananas.
We have finished all the tasks except for the final one.
She has visited every country in Europe except for Greece.
He enjoys all sports except for soccer.

senses.definition: in replacement of something that is typically expected or required

examples.x: She received a gift card in lieu of a traditional birthday present.
They decided to use email communication in lieu of face-to-face meetings.
The manager allowed employees to take extra time off in lieu of overtime pay.
The company provided gift cards to employees in lieu of a holiday party.
She offered her time in lieu of a monetary donation to the charity.

senses.definition: as a substitute for someone or something

examples.x: Sarah was chosen to speak in place of the absent team leader during the presentation.
He used almond milk in place of regular milk in the recipe.
The temporary employee worked in place of the regular receptionist while she was on vacation.
They decided to use video conferencing in place of in-person meetings.
She was appointed as the team leader in place of the previous manager.

senses.definition: as a substitute for someone or something else

examples.x: She chose tea instead of coffee for her morning beverage.
She decided to take a walk instead of going for a run this evening.
Instead of a traditional wedding cake, they opted for a dessert table.
They decided to stay home instead of going out to dinner.
She wore flats instead of heels to the party for comfort.

senses.definition: excluding a particular thing, person, or condition

examples.x: Outside of the occasional rainy day, the weather here is usually sunny.
Outside of the team captain, everyone attended the meeting.
The library is open every day outside of public holidays.
She enjoys all genres of music outside of country.
The company has a great reputation outside of a few negative reviews.

senses.definition: without taking into consideration or being influenced by a particular factor or condition

examples.x: I'll be there tomorrow regardless of the weather.
She always treats everyone with kindness, regardless of their background.
The policy applies to all employees, regardless of their tenure.
He plans to pursue his dreams, regardless of the obstacles he may face.
Regardless of the cost, they are determined to renovate their home.

senses.definition: beyond the distance or capability of someone or something to access or attain

examples.x: The cookies were placed on the top shelf, out of reach of the children.
The remote village was out of reach of modern telecommunications.
The goal seemed out of reach of the struggling team.
The fruit on the top branches was out of reach of the harvesters.
The dream of space travel was out of reach of most people until recent advancements.

senses.definition: not including a specific item, person, or condition

examples.x: With the exception of Susan, everyone on the team attended the meeting.
All the students passed the exam with the exception of one who failed.
The restaurant serves all dishes with the exception of seafood.
He enjoys all sports with the exception of soccer.
She's an excellent student with the exception of math, which she struggles with.

senses.definition: used to indicate an exception or exclusion from something or someone

examples.x: Apart from my sister, everyone in our family loves sports.
Apart from the tickets, we didn't spend much money on the trip.
I have finished all my chores apart from doing the laundry.
She can speak multiple languages, apart from Italian.
The car is in perfect condition apart from a small scratch on the door.
